texto: You don't know what a rough crowd is. If all I have to do is go make people laugh, that's nothing. Let me tell you what a tough crowd is. A tough crowd is going to a morning service and you got six people there and you gotta pat your house payment. That's a tough crowd.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Sam Kinison sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “You don't know what a rough crowd is. If all I have to do is go make people laugh, that's nothing…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, service, me, útil em momentos de bom-dia e me.
